videos.title: Game Theory #21:  World War Trump
videos.description:
In this Tuesday, April 21, 2026 lecture to his Beijing high school students, Professor Jiang explains America's national security strategy, and why this war in Iran cannot end.

Notes and References:
1.  America's National Security Strategy
https://media.defense.gov/2026/Jan/23/2003864773/-1/-1/0/2026-NATIONAL-DEFENSE-STRATEGY.PDF

videos.title: Custom skills with hooks enforce quality at the point of creation, not after the fact
videos.description: This is the CICD mindset applied upstream—you can now architect opinionated workflows into the coding process itself, not just the deployment process. Build guardrails that make the golden path the only path.
